market_pulse: Strong Friday momentum across LIV/Encore/OMNIA with DJ Pauly D, Laidback Luke, and Fisher bookings; Palm Tree Beach Club gaining traction with Yo Yolie at 11am Friday; Zouk and Hakkasan maintaining consistent club momentum.

weekend_readiness.label: HIGH
factors: Multiple heavyweight DJ bookings Fri/Sat (Pauly D, Laidback Luke, Fisher)
Pool season momentum with Diplo at Encore Beach Club
LIV Nightclub stable roster (Tiësto, John Summit, Dom Dolla)
Capacity pressure expected Sat night at most venues
weekend_readiness.liv_recommendation: Lock in Saturday talent NOW. Tiësto or John Summit for night-time draw critical. Monitor Encore/OMNIA capacity fill-rates hourly Fri-Sat.

content_gaps.description: Tech-house and deep house blending trending at Encore Beach Club (Westend residency noted March 27) and Zouk—LIV missing mid-tempo tech content in social reels
content_gaps.suggested_action: Commission 3-5 tech-house trending audio reels featuring resident DJs. Layer with behind-the-scenes Halo tech setup footage.

content_gaps.description: OMNIA, Hakkasan, and Zouk heavily leveraging Instagram Stories for Friday night countdowns and last-minute talent reveals; LIV Stories lag frequency
content_gaps.suggested_action: Launch daily 6pm countdown story poll + 8pm final-lineup reveal. Tie to bottle service promo codes for urgency.

content_gaps.description: @globeth0tter (591 likes) posted honest LIV review on TikTok; competitor venues lacking user-generated review content. LIV can capitalize on this.
content_gaps.suggested_action: Repost @globeth0tter with permission. Create hashtag #LIVHonestReview for UGC collection. Seed with 3-5 macro influencers for weekly reviews.

influencer_activity.mention: Posted honest review of LIV Nightclub as guest-list attendee with 591 likes — high engagement, positive vibe. Notable for credible influencer endorsement.
Edwin Griffiths promoter account posting guest-list promos regularly, 2+ videos per week with detailed door policies and promo codes (GRIFFITHS). Drive significant traffic.
Cross-promoting Tao Beach with high-engagement rooftop pool content; mentions Venetian, reaching similar demographic as LIV (daytime + nightlife stack).

liv_outreach_targets.reason: Credible TikTok reviewer with honest LIV endorsement; 591 likes = strong engagement. Repost partnership potential.
liv_outreach_targets.suggested_ask: Feature her full review with permission; offer guest-list + bottle service credit for follow-up content

liv_outreach_targets.reason: Edwin Griffiths is LIV's own promoter & amplifier—maximize his reach by providing exclusive promo codes, early talent announcements.
liv_outreach_targets.suggested_ask: Give him 48-hour exclusive on weekend DJ reveals before public Instagram drop

story_activity.summary: Friday night (4/11) DJ Pauly D + Fisher back-to-back Stories with countdown stickers and bottle service call-outs
R&Bae Wednesdays feature posts + Friday Laidback Luke + Saturday Chase B Stories (4/08-4/11)
Yo Yolie Friday 11am daytime Stories with early-bird 15% bottle discount (expires noon)

venues.summary: Stable Friday momentum with multi-date DJ roster (Tiësto, John Summit confirmed). Instagram 87K followers, 639 posts. TikTok influencer reviews (globeth0tter, 591 likes) indicate strong social proof.

Multiple outfit guides and backstage access content; @globeth0tter honest review as guest-list attendee with 591 likes.

LIV Beach daytime posts highlighting pool scene and DJ lineups (Westend March 27, Discolines March 28).
